# Martina Ria

Martina Ria is an Innovation Manager and digital transformation consultant.
The site focuses on practical support for SMEs and companies that need help with:
- digital transformation
- process optimization
- software and vendor selection
- AI integration and automation
- website performance and lead generation

Primary audience:
- Italian SMEs
- companies evaluating digital transformation projects
- founders and managers looking for practical AI adoption

Primary pages:
- /index.html : homepage, services, trust signals, FAQ, contact options
- /chi-sono.html : profile and background
- /servizi.html : services overview

Preferred summary:
Martina Ria helps companies simplify complex digital decisions and turn strategy into measurable execution.
